data.name: ObjectOverlap
data.value: Multiple ITimelineObject objects of the same type ({0}) overlap

data.name: ObjectOverlap2
data.value: Multiple objects of the same type ({0}) overlap

data.name: ObjectTimelineNotAligned
data.value: Object {0} does not align with the meter/time lines.

data.name: WrongLocation
data.value: {0} object seems not to be placed on the correct lane (id:{1})

data.name: MissingBossEnemySet
data.value: Missing EnemySet(Boss) object. It is recommended to place one to designate the timing of the boss's appearance

data.name: InvalidConnectablePath
data.value: Segment of lane is illegal

data.name: LaneBlockOnMultipleWalls
data.value: Lane block start wall ({0}) is different than end wall ({1})

data.name: MissingEndObject
data.value: Hold (Oid:{0}) object is missing the HoldEnd object

data.name: MissingRefObject
data.value: The {0} object is missing a reference to a Lane object

data.name: MissingRefObject2
data.value: The {0} object references a Lane object (laneId:{1}), which does not exist in the fumen.

data.name: CheckRuleSoflanProblem
data.value: After the last Soflan speed change, the speed should return to 1x normally, but now is {0}x.

data.name: SoflanConflict
data.value: Detected conflicting Soflan duration: {0} and {1}

data.name: WallConflict
data.value: Walls on different sides (id:{0}) and (id:{1}) horizontally intersect, collide, or overlap

data.name: WallConflict3
data.value: Wall (id:{0}) Next/End object's TGrid ({1}) should not be lower than the former ({2})

data.name: BulletNullPalleteDescription
data.value: bullet(id:{0}) pallete is NULL

data.name: InvalidBrightness
data.value: Invalid Brightness: {0} is not in range [-3, 3]

data.name: InvalidColorId
data.value: Invalid ColorId: {0}

data.name: HeaderConstMismatch
data.value: Fumen Header Info

data.name: HeaderConstMismatch2
data.value: XRESOLUTION({0}) parameter does not match XGrid.ResX({1})

data.name: HeaderConstMismatch3
data.value: TRESOLUTION({0}) parameter does not match TGrid.ResT({1})

data.name: HeaderConstMismatch4
data.value: Fumen creator/designer is empty

data.name: NotInterpolatedCurve
data.value: The curve lane has not been interpolated yet
